manuals.title: Builder Manual
manuals.description: The complete door-to-door solar sales training path.

folders.description: Welcome to the team. Complete all modules to begin your journey.

modules.description: Introduction to Your Energy Best and what to expect.
modules.next_step: Complete this module, then move to Company Values.

folders.title: Level 1.0: Question Adventurer
folders.description: Master the art of asking great questions at the door.

folders.title: Level 1.5
folders.description: Intermediate questioning skills. Practice in the field.

folders.title: Level 2.5
folders.description: Advanced redirection practice. Field validation required.

folders.title: Level 3.0: Knocking Existing Installs
folders.description: Master the approach for homes that already have solar.

folders.title: Level 5.0: Opening the Sandbox
folders.description: Advanced questioning — opening possibilities with homeowners.

folders.title: Level 6.0: Solidifying Appointments
folders.description: Lock in appointments and reduce cancellations.

folders.title: Level 7.0: Solution Presentation
folders.description: Master the in-home or virtual presentation.

folders.title: Level 9.0: Training Others
folders.description: Become a trainer. Teach what you know.

manuals.description: Technical solar knowledge and system design.
